docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.93 FILED BY LI, HUI MEI AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, JUDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, JUDY
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $980.00 FILED BY KWOK, JUDY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LI, HUI MEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LI, HUI MEI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, HUI MEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWOK, JUDY $850.93 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $880.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KWOK, JUDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LI, HUI MEI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT KWOK, JUDY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27406, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, HUI MEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWOK, JUDY $455.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $455.93, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27406 ON 12/10/03 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KWOK, JUDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LI, HUI MEI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, JUDY
